name: GZA
bio: GZA (Gary Grice), also known as 'The Genius,' is widely regarded as the most lyrical and cerebral member of the Wu-Tang Clan. His solo album 'Liquid Swords' is considered one of the greatest hip-hop albums of all time.
facts: Was the first Wu-Tang member to sign a major record deal (with Cold Chillin' Records).
Known for his chess-inspired wordplay and intricate lyricism.
